name: Maranatha Baptist Church
description: Come play pickleball at Maranatha Baptist Church in Saint Robert, MO! There are 2 indoor hard courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like food, restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.

name: Richland High School Tennis Courts
description: Richland High School Tennis Courts is a place to play pickleball in Richland, MO. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like water and lights.
